subject: [PATCH v3 3/3] fuse: use iomap helper to mark folio uptodate

2026-07-07.patch_summary: This patch updates the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) code to use a new helper function, iomap_folio_mark_uptodate(), when marking folios as uptodate. This is necessary because when large folios are enabled, the uptodate state of an iomap-backed folio can become out of sync if only the folio-level flag is updated. The patch addresses this issue by using the new helper function to update both the folio uptodate state and the iomap uptodate bitmap. This change ensures that the uptodate state remains consistent across both the folio and the iomap, even when large folios are enabled.
